Competency probe: Implement automatic stop triggers, owner pause, kill path, partial-output policy, cleanup, incident contact, and restart authorization.

For Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Defend the Stop Contact model · Theory Stop Contact, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: A crawler should retry until completion regardless of owner or failure state.
